data.name: Game of Hearts
data.detailed_description:
Multi-Chapter Series

Game of Hearts is the first entry in a planned multi-game series.


關於此遊戲

An erotic visual novel told through a cinematic mix of still renders and animated scenes. Game of Hearts aims to deliver a dramatic, down-to-earth, romance narrative that is augmented and heightened with hints of supernatural fantasy.

You have the ability to hear people's innermost thoughts and feelings. Because of this, you always knew you were different, that you were special. However, you never expected to learn that the reason why is because the blood of a demon runs through your veins.

Turns out there is a whole other world out there, hidden in plain sight. Dark forces struggle for control in a fierce war of succession-  you must earn your seat at the table by using your irresistible, devilish charm to seduce women into joining your harem of loyal followers.

  • MATURE NARRATIVE: a deeply human drama with a touch of otherworldly fantasy

  • ANIMATED SEX SCENES: a multitude of fully animated scenes with beautiful graphics

  • THRILLING ROMANCE: compelling & twisted love affairs that tug at the heart-strings

data.short_description: An erotic visual novel where dark forces struggle for power in a fierce war of succession. Use your ability to read minds to seduce women into joining your harem of loyal followers.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 11
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz or faster processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 11 & Shader Model 5.0 compatible — GeForce 400 / Radeon HD 5000 / Intel HD 4000
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 11
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz or faster processor
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 11 & Shader Model 5.0 compatible — GeForce 400 / Radeon HD 5000 / Intel HD 4000
  • Storage: 8 GB available space
